name: Leona Miyamura
description: She is Toranosuke Miyamura's older sister. She is seen to have this abstract and cold personality towards people around her and is seen to inflict violence on those who come around her. She is also seen as crazy by Yamada, but she really care for her brother as when she thanked Yamada for being Toranosuke's friend and refused to get her brother mixed up in the witches.

name: Mai Fuyuki
description: [Minami's](https://anilist.co/character/142801/Minami-Fuyuki) and [Momoko's](https://anilist.co/character/323450/Momoko-Fuyuki) mother.

name: Masaru Daimon
description: Marcus Damon, is a fictional character in the Digimon Data Squad series. His name, Masaru, means Victory in Japanese. He is the first human lead of any Digimon serial, excluding C'mon Digimon, that doesn't wear goggles. Marcus is also the first human protagonist to physically hurt Digimon on a regular basis. Marcus is presented as a fourteen year-old student who loves to fight. He lives with his mother and younger sister Kristy (Chika). Marcus meets and fights Agumon in the first episode of the

name: Musashi
description: __Height:__ 190 cm __ID:__ 4634 An inmate assigned to Nanba Prison's Building 4, Cell 10.

name: Muu Kusunoki
description: __Height:__ 162 cm __Status:__ Prisoner No.004 A beautiful female prisoner with an air of purity; her features strongly allude to having non-Japanese origins. Despite what one may infer from her fragile appearance, she is forthright and opposes the abnormal circumstance that is Milgram. Treated Es with extreme caution in the beginning. Each of her mannerisms suggest a good upbringing; one can imagine that she was likely born into a wealthy household. Perhaps that may explain why her pride is so

name: Naoki Fujieda
description: He is the drummer of Trapnest. Like Nobu in Black Stones, he's the "clueless", loud-mouthed member of his band. As with the rest of his bandmates, he's a friend of Yasu. He's a big fan of glam rock bands or musical artists, like David Bowie, and his look is inspired by the glam rock look. He started playing drums when Takumi asked him to be in the music club in high school, thinking that he'd be perfect in him and Reira's band with his blond hair and "Prince"-ly appearance. Naoki was very excite

name: Noi Komazawa
description: A member of Black Onyx and Rai's younger brother. He enjoyes wearing cute clothes on his avatar. He's usually quite lazy, but when motivated, he provides good fanservice.

name: Ocoho
description: Ocoho is an apprentice of the Order of the Sorcerer-Knights of Cyfandir.

name: Ragnarök
description: Ragnarok, also known as the Demon Sword, is the weapon partner of Crona. Born a normal demon weapon, it was melted by Medusa in a vat of Black Blood while in its weapon form and mixed into Crona's blood.

name: Ryousuke Kira
description: Previously a second year football player at Matsukaze Kokuo High and now #289 in Blue Lock. He is a pretty boy with girls swooning over him. He plays as a striker and, like Yoichi, is a team-based player. Ryousuke is skeptical about the whole Blue Lock program and is against the thought of an ego-driven striker. Due to this, he is trying to defeat all 299 other strikers at Blue Lock. ~!He is kicked out of Blue Lock after being defeated by Yoichi and Meguru.!~

name: Seol-Jin Heo
description: Seol-Jin is Initially an outcasted and bullied loner in his place of origin, South Korea, with low self-esteem and a love for webtoons. He was then suddenly transported into the world of one of his loved webtoon to embark in a journey to becoming the world’s number one ranked player.

name: Sora
description: A rare slime that is almost never seen. It has no official name and is variously referred to as the "Weakest Slime" or the "Fragile Slime." According to monster guidebooks, it is said to be "so frail that it vanishes from existence if merely poked or exposed to a strong gust of wind." It becomes [Ivy's](https://anilist.co/character/294131/Ivy) friend, and the two set out on a journey together. It consumes blue potions—bottle and all.
mediaTitles: The Weakest Tamer Began a Journey to Pick Up Trash
The Weakest Tamer Began a Journey to Pick Up Trash

name: ST AR-15
description: ST AR-15, shortened AR-15, is a serious, strict and capable elite T-Doll and part of the AR Team. Despite her strictness toward AR Team members, AR-15 genuinely considers them her friends and revenge against the enemies who hurt them was a strong motivation for her. After escaping from Griffin for a time, she has acquired a reputation as a disobedient soldier only valuing her own freedom. She approaches battles with confidence, saying a soldier's courage honors its leaders. In contrast to M4, wh

name: Suzu Fuura
description: A horror manga artist who enjoys the screams of others. Despite her odd behavior, she is rather pretty.

name: Tama
description: Originally a nameless slave known simply as "Cat" belonging to a man named [Urs](https://anilist.co/character/188389/Urs), but became master-less after his death. She was given the name "Tama" by [Satou](https://anilist.co/character/124921/Ichiro-Suzuki) during the events of the labyrinth and became his slave after leaving the labyrinth. Tama considers [Pochi](https://anilist.co/character/124912/Pochi) as her younger sister despite the fact that she is a Cat demi-human and Pochi is a Dog demi-hu

name: Tiramie
description: A fairy of flowers with the form of a pink Pomeranian dog, and one of the park's mascots. He seems to be a pervert with a keen eye for young women and bewitching older women. He also seems to be knowledgeable about explosives.

description: __Height:__ 158 cm A first year, she is a ninja prodigy. She cares very much for Hibari who she supports the most. She wears an eye patch over her right eye and carries an umbrella (armed with various weapons) at all times. Her summoning animal is the giant squid. ~!The biggest reason she is sticking together with Hibari because of her little sister; Yagyuu's little sister died due to illness a year before the series, and thought it was her fault that she died. name: Yusaku Kudo
description: Yusaku Kudo was already noted for his sharp intellect and deductive abilities at a young age. He met Inspector [Juzo Megure](https://anilist.co/character/4253/Juzo-Megure) and became a good friend and valuable adviser to him in solving very difficult cases. While he often assisted the police, Yusaku's primary aspiration was that of a writer. Quickly attracting acclaim in his early twenties as a young novelist, he encountered the girl whom he resolved to marry: [Yukiko Fujimine,](https://anilist.

name: Yuzuha Usagi
description: __Specialty:__ Physical (Spade) The heroine of Alice in Borderland. Her alias which means "rabbit" in Japanese refers the White Rabbit in Alice in Wonderland. She is a skilled mountaineer thanks to her father. ~!She lost hope when her father committed suicide.!~ ~!She later gets married to Ryouhei Arisu and becomes Yuzuha Arisu.!~ (Source: Alice in Borderland Wiki)

name: Allelujah Haptism
nativeName: アレルヤ・ハプティズム
description: __Unit:__ GN-003 Kyrios, GN-007 Arios Gundam, GN-011 Gundam Harute Allelujah Haptism is known as calm and kind-hearted man who has a sadistic-persona named Hallelujah. He is also the lover of [Soma Peries](https://anilist.co/character/6175/Soma-Peries). The two personalities have their own range of specialty when it comes to combat situations. name: Arashi Nagase
description: Miwako's boyfriend and a student of Yazagaku who also works with George to run Paradise Kiss. He is the son of a musician and a guitarist in a punk band. He tends to act rough, but can be very caring. He also has quite an assortment of facial piercings. Son of Kanzaki Risa, who is a good friend of Mikako Kouda, also from Gokinjo Monogatari. (Source: Wikipedia)
